item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Microbusiness Support Act
item.description:
👀 Microbusiness Support

Federal microbusiness support 119th Congress: SBA microloan expansion · cooperative-class microbusiness eligibility · technical assistance. Composes with #10 VSL + #11 Lets Make Bread + Worker-Cooperative Conversion Tax Deferral. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
